name: @anthropic-ai/skills
description: Adobe skills for AI coding agents

scripts.validate: find skills -name SKILL.md -exec dirname {} \; | xargs -I {} skills-ref validate {}
scripts.test: npm run validate && node --test "skills/aem/cloud-service/skills/migration/scripts/bpa-findings-helper.test.js" && node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-plugin/marketplace.json','utf8')); console.log('marketplace.json: OK')"
